channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-07-17 11:02 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink now available in Côte d'Ivoire!
item.description: Starlink now available in Côte d'Ivoire!

item.title: @elonmusk: Love the new Starship Schematics T-shirt sold by SpaceX
item.description: Love the new Starship Schematics T-shirt sold by SpaceX

item.title: @elonmusk: We have Falcon and Starship taking off almost at the same time today (~2 hours apart) For other spac...
item.description: We have Falcon and Starship taking off almost at the same time today (~2 hours apart) For other space programs, this is years' worth of launch cycle, and SpaceX does it in a day

item.title: @elonmusk: Today I’m really feeling the acceleration.
item.description: Today I’m really feeling the acceleration.

item.title: @elonmusk: A lot of people asked for this, so Muse Spark 1.1 is now on OpenRouter.
item.description: A lot of people asked for this, so Muse Spark 1.1 is now on OpenRouter.

item.title: @elonmusk: No Starship, no orbital data centers. No orbital data centers, no potential $28.5 trillion market. B...
item.description: No Starship, no orbital data centers. No orbital data centers, no potential $28.5 trillion market. Before you watch tonight's launch, see what we think SpaceX's master plan is.

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceXAI has updated Zero Data Retention (ZDR) in Docs with more information
item.description: SpaceXAI has updated Zero Data Retention (ZDR) in Docs with more information

item.title: @elonmusk: Some of the engines didn’t start, triggering an automatic launch abort. Now offloading propellant. N...
item.description: Some of the engines didn’t start, triggering an automatic launch abort. Now offloading propellant. Next launch attempt hopefully in a few days.

item.title: @elonmusk: To be confident of a good flight, 2 Raptors will be removed & replaced. Most probable launch timing ...
item.description: To be confident of a good flight, 2 Raptors will be removed & replaced. Most probable launch timing is early next week.

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink V3 will increase space-based bandwidth by ~2 orders of magnitude
item.description: Starlink V3 will increase space-based bandwidth by ~2 orders of magnitude

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.5 is the first time I feel like I can regularly use a Grok model for building software.
item.description: Grok 4.5 is the first time I feel like I can regularly use a Grok model for building software.

item.title: @elonmusk: Turns out Elon was completely right The coding moat is disappearing in real time
item.description: Turns out Elon was completely right The coding moat is disappearing in real time
